SaleDetailId.description: The ID which gets assigned to the item when item is added to the cart.

Id.description: The ID of the purchased item. Use this ID when calling the GET Services or GET Products endpoint.

IsService.description: When `true`, indicates that the purchased item was a pricing option for a service.

BarcodeId.description: The barcode number of the purchased item. Use this ID when calling the GET Products endpoint.

Description.description: The description of the sale transaction/pricing option.
Description.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

ContractId.description: The contract purchased by the client. Use this ID when calling the GET Contract endpoint.

CategoryId.description: The revenue category ID used for sale. Use this ID when calling the GET Categories endpoint.

UnitPrice.description: er Unit Price of the item purchased.

Quantity.description: Quantity of the purchased item, applicable for products only. Note: Negative numbers indicate returned items.

DiscountPercent.description: The percent discount that was applied to the items subtotal.

DiscountAmount.description: The total discount amount that was applied to the items subtotal.

Tax1.description: A decimal representation of the first tax rate that was applied to the items subtotal.

Tax2.description: A decimal representation of the second tax rate that was applied to the items subtotal.

Tax3.description: A decimal representation of the third tax rate that was applied to the items subtotal.

Tax4.description: A decimal representation of the fourth tax rate that was applied to the items subtotal.

Tax5.description: A decimal representation of the fifth tax rate that was applied to the items subtotal.

TaxAmount.description: Total tax amount that is summation of tax1, tax2, tax3, tax4 and tax5.

TotalAmount.description: The items total, once discounts and/or tax was applied.

Notes.description: Note made by the customer while purchasing item.
Notes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

Returned.description: When `true`, indicates that the purchased item is returned, `false` otherwise.

PaymentRefId.description: The payment reference ID generated during payment of sold item.

ExpDate.description: The expiration date of the pricing option purchased.

ActiveDate.description: The activation date of pricing option purchased.
